I can if you want
Both of those teams are a bit weird and doesn't synergies together
Depending on what you aim to play and what you own
I can try to help you

For example, you're better with kath + ramona instead of kath alone since her X card scale based on arithmetica used

Both posse and wheels doesn't make sense.

Tulu on the other hand is better for para comps, so you can brick people's hand with unplayable strike cards on the long run
Stuff like tulu + gramona + 24 + erica

With that team, caecus is like a brick, he is supposed to be more on the front because he can cpunter stacks, if you want him backrow then at least try to use his kit because he play on either blighten or strike. You don't have any strike related wheel in your team.

Meanwhile arachne team would be better with stuff like skills spam related wheels, you play it and it reshuffle into your deck so you can scale it further
Alright, do you have any good skill spam wheels to suggest then? Or someone to swap Caesus for on that team?
Something like that
The posse reunion copy the previous skill used - 1 cost in the same turn
The wheel below daff draw 1 skill from the equipped unit after 1 skill is used, only activate 1 time per turns
The wheel below doll draw 1 skill from other allies when the owner use a skill, only activate 1 time per turns
I should have pulled for Daff during her rerun. She is so fun to use in draft
I use her so often in draft I often forget I don’t actually own her
